attributes.action: Make self defence classes mandatory for young girls in schools.
attributes.additional_details: Femicide is on the rise, women are assaulted everyday, it is time to stand up. Far too many women are victims from a young age and don’t know it or know how to defend themselves.
attributes.background:
Teach young girls what attack can look like and what the warning signs are. 
Teach young girls what they can do to defend themselves within the parameters of the law.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Fund self-defence for students and women, and legalise licensed defence tools
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/752355

Introduce self-defence lessons into the PE curriculum in all secondary schools
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749166
